homeParagraph: Hello, I'm Muhammad Isa Nuruddin a Web Developer with a strong passion for modern web development. I enjoy building applications that not only function well but also provide comfortable and engaging user experiences. I am capable of working both independently and collaboratively in a team, and I am always enthusiastic about learning new technologies.
aboutP1: Hello, I'm Muhammad Isa Nuruddin a Web Developer with a strong passion for modern web development. I enjoy building applications that not only function well but also provide comfortable and engaging user experiences. I am capable of working both independently and collaboratively in a team, and I am always enthusiastic about learning new technologies.
toolsP4: Some tools and technologies I use for building websites.
projectP1: Here are some projects that I have built.
notFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist.
projects.1.name: Refood App
projects.1.description: Refood App is a food ordering website featuring a Decision Tree–based menu recommendation system to help users choose meals based on their preferences. This project was developed as a final semester assignment.
projects.2.name: Jejak Rempah Marketplace (JRM)
projects.2.description: JRM (Jejak Rempah Marketplace) is a spice marketplace platform that allows users to buy, sell, and create their own stores based on available spice network locations across Indonesia.
projects.3.name: Sistem Informasi Hackjog
projects.3.description: Hackjog Information System is an event information website developed during an internship at PT Hacktivate Teknologi Indonesia with a team of 4 members to provide easier access to Hackjog event information.
